task_completion.description: Set the entire document font to Courier New, 12pt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Word 2010 Home tab, the Font dropdown should display 'Courier New' and the Size dropdown should display '12' when the text is selected.

task_completion.description: Set page margins to Top: 1.0", Bottom: 1.0", Left: 1.5", and Right: 1.0".
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Page Setup dialog should show the specified margins, or the horizontal/vertical rulers should visually reflect a 1.5-inch left margin and 1.0-inch top/bottom/right margins.

task_completion.description: Apply a 2.0" Left Indent to Character Names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When a Character Name is selected, the horizontal ruler's left indent marker (the bottom rectangle) should be positioned at the 2.0-inch mark, or the Paragraph dialog should show a 2.0" left indent.

task_completion.description: Apply a 1.0" Left Indent and 1.5" Right Indent to Dialogue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When Dialogue text is selected, the horizontal ruler's left indent marker should be at the 1.0-inch mark, and the right indent marker should be moved 1.5 inches inwards from the right margin (at the 4.5-inch mark on the ruler).

task_completion.description: Apply a 1.5" Left Indent to Parentheticals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When a Parenthetical is selected, the horizontal ruler's left indent marker should be positioned at the 1.5-inch mark.

task_completion.description: Save the formatted file as 'Formatted_Script.docx' in the 'Documents' folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Word window title bar should display 'Formatted_Script.docx', or a Save As dialog should be visible saving the file with this name in the Documents folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the Microsoft Word 2010 GUI to format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Word 2010 application ribbons, dialogs, and rulers.

integrity.description: The agent used proper paragraph indentation settings rather than manual spacing.
integrity.visual_evidence: Text alignment should be achieved via ruler markers or the Paragraph dialog, not by repeatedly pressing the spacebar or tab key (which would show as multiple space/tab characters if formatting marks are on).

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no PowerShell or command prompt windows used to directly generate or manipulate the .docx XML files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task requires formatting a document in Microsoft Word 2010. Font: Courier New 12pt. Margins: Top/Bottom 1.0", Left 1.5", Right 1.0". Indents: Character Names 2.0" Left; Dialogue 1.0" Left, 1.5" Right; Parentheticals 1.5" Left. Scene Headings/Action remain at 0". Save as 'Formatted_Script.docx' in Documents. Note: The input file 'Raw_Script_Scene.docx' is missing from the environment, so the agent may fail to open it or might create a mock document to proceed.
